WORD wEndOfTopBar
 Unsigned integers represent the last line of the letterbox bar area at the top of the screen. 0 indicates the top without a horizontal bar. More...
 
WORD wStartOfBottomBar
 Unsigned integers represent the first line of the letterbox bar at the bottom of the horizontal screen. 0 indicates no horizontal bar at the bottom. More...
 
WORD wEndOfLeftBar
 Unsigned integer, representing the last pixel of the vertical letterbox bar on the left. 0 indicates no left vertical bar at the bottom. More...
 
WORD wStartOfRightBar
 Unsigned integer, representing the first pixel of the vertical letterbox bar on the right. 0 indicates no right vertical bar at the bottom. More...
 

Detailed Description

HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD.

Records AVI infoframe.

Member Data Documentation

Whether the active format is present.

RGB quantization range.

scan information

BYTE _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::byVIC

Video identification code.

BYTE _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::byYCCQuantizationRange

YCCC quantization range.

WORD _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::wEndOfLeftBar

Unsigned integer, representing the last pixel of the vertical letterbox bar on the left. 0 indicates no left vertical bar at the bottom.

WORD _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::wEndOfTopBar

Unsigned integers represent the last line of the letterbox bar area at the top of the screen. 0 indicates the top without a horizontal bar.

WORD _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::wStartOfBottomBar

Unsigned integers represent the first line of the letterbox bar at the bottom of the horizontal screen. 0 indicates no horizontal bar at the bottom.

WORD _HDMI_AVI_INFOFRAME_PAYLOAD::wStartOfRightBar

Unsigned integer, representing the first pixel of the vertical letterbox bar on the right. 0 indicates no right vertical bar at the bottom.
